mapper.insert: INSERT INTO social_post(user_id, content, like_count, comment_count, status) VALUES(#{userId}, #{content}, #{likeCount}, #{commentCount}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, content, like_count, comment_count, status, created_at, updated_at FROM social_post WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'NORMAL'
mapper.update: UPDATE social_post SET status = 'DELETED' WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'NORMAL'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM social_post WHERE status = 'NORMAL'

SELECT p.id, p.user_id, u.nickname AS author_nickname, p.content, p.like_count, p.comment_count, CASE WHEN sl.id IS NULL THEN FALSE ELSE TRUE END AS liked, p.created_at FROM social_post p JOIN sys_user u ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN social_like sl ON sl.post_id = p.id AND sl.user_id = #{currentUserId} WHERE p.status = 'NORMAL' ORDER BY p.created_at DESC, p.id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO social_comment(post_id, user_id, content) VALUES(#{postId}, #{userId}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.post_id, c.user_id, u.nickname AS author_nickname, c.content, c.created_at FROM social_comment c JOIN sys_user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY c.created_at ASC, c.id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE social_post SET comment_count = comment_count + 1 WHERE id = #{postId} AND status = 'NORMAL'
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM social_like WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE social_post SET like_count = like_count + 1 WHERE id = #{postId} AND status = 'NORMAL'
